subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Even as thou hast written, the power to teach is a gift bestowed from on high, not an acquired trait. It is proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق همانست که مرقوم نموده ای قوت تبلیغ موهبتی است نه اکتسابی بیان حجت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @disregarding own capacity in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @confidence; courage; faith in teaching the Cause
